# Community Whitelist - Domains
# Submitted by community members via GitHub Issues
# Format: One domain per line (e.g., example.com)
# Managed exclusively by GitHub Actions - DO NOT edit manually on server
#
# To submit a whitelist request, open an Issue:
# https://github.com/spydisec/spydithreatintel/issues/new/choose
t.castle.io # Issue #11: Legitimate Service / SaaS Provider (by @citactadmin)
wcpstatic.microsoft.com # Issue #12: Legitimate Service / SaaS Provider (by @citactadmin)
js.skyscnr.com # Issue #13: False Positive (legitimate site incorrectly blocked) (by @citactadmin)
content.skyscnr.com # Issue #13: False Positive (legitimate site incorrectly blocked) (by @citactadmin)
reward.medibank.com.au # Issue #15: False Positive (legitimate site incorrectly blocked) (by @citactadmin)
url7111.reward.medibank.com.au # Issue #15: False Positive (legitimate site incorrectly blocked) (by @citactadmin)
elb-iow-gcp.nimbus.bitdefender.net # Issue #16: Legitimate Service / SaaS Provider (by @citactadmin)
mclb-gcp.nimbus.bitdefender.net # Issue #16: Legitimate Service / SaaS Provider (by @citactadmin)
nimbus.bitdefender.net # Issue #16: Legitimate Service / SaaS Provider (by @citactadmin)
outside-scanner.ff.avast.com # Issue #16: Legitimate Service / SaaS Provider (by @citactadmin)
nibdev-prod.tf.ff.avast.com # Issue #16: Legitimate Service / SaaS Provider (by @citactadmin)
netrep.svc.avast.com # Issue #16: Legitimate Service / SaaS Provider (by @citactadmin)
deviceid.ff.avast.com # Issue #16: Legitimate Service / SaaS Provider (by @citactadmin)
crm.zoho.com # Issue #17: False Positive (legitimate site incorrectly blocked) (by @citactadmin)
id.milestonelogin.com # Issue #18: False Positive (legitimate site incorrectly blocked) (by @citactadmin)
